creator: mi+m@aldan.algebra.com
text:
Yes, that's fine as far as I am concerned. A quip in UPDATING may be needed t=
oo.

--=20
Sent from mobile device, please, pardon shorthand.

Oct 10, 2013 =CF 4:51 Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org> =CE=C1=D0=C9=D3=C1=D7=
(=CC=C1):

>> On Wed, 09 Oct 2013 17:35:11 -0400 Mikhail T. wrote:
>> I'd rather the tool remained available -- for the benefit of developers u=
sing it
>> for their own projects as well as to help facilitate porting Trinity (the=
 modern
>> fork of KDE3).
>=20
> Ok, makes sense. Can we explicitly state in COMMENT and pkg-descr that thi=
s
> port is for Qt 3 and maybe rename the port to qmake3/qmake-qt3?
>=20
> Max
